ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot mimicking the movement of a mountain railway, emphasizing the uphill climb and the winding path.  The robot will use both arms to illustrate the ascent and turns.  We will use a 4-frame sequence to capture the dynamic movement. Frame 1: Both arms start at the sides, representing the beginning of the journey. Frame 2: The right arm moves upward and slightly outward, suggesting the start of the uphill climb. The left arm remains relatively still for contrast. Frame 3: The left arm now joins the right in an upward movement, but with a slight inward turn, showing the railway winding. Frame 4: Both arms reach their peak, angled upward and slightly away from each other, representing the summit of the mountain.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready for the climb
the right arm begins the steady uphill ascent
the left arm joins, winding the path upward
both arms reach the peak, a triumphant ascent
